results.title: This puzzle game’s simple premise hides surprising depth
results.description: What's the Password? has a simple concept: To solve each of the game's more than 100 puzzles, you have to type in the right four-digit password on a number pad. That might sound like a limited constraint. But the simplicity gives solo developer Dan DiIorio, better known as TrampolineTales, lots of room to play with [...]

results.title: Kansas City woman makes $4,000 by renting own home out for World Cup
results.description: Robin Urton, 61, decided to rent out her Kansas City home for the World Cup on Airbnb after learning how much homeowners could earn from the sporting event — and has already made $4,881.
